findings.message: Frequent polling trigger 'Cron' can create high execution volume
findings.recommendation: Replace frequent polling with webhook or event-based trigger when possible

findings.message: AI/LLM node 'OpenAI' has variable token-based cost that can escalate
findings.recommendation: Estimate token/API cost before production; set usage limits and monitor spend

findings.message: Workflow has no error workflow configured
findings.recommendation: Configure an error workflow to handle failures gracefully

findings.message: HTTP Request node inside a loop/batch can multiply API calls and costs
findings.recommendation: Add rate limits, concurrency controls, or move HTTP calls outside the loop

findings.message: Workflow has no error workflow configured
findings.recommendation: Configure an error workflow to handle failures gracefully

findings.message: Webhook 'Webhook' triggers external HTTP calls — cascading chain risk
findings.recommendation: Review if webhook triggers downstream workflows; add idempotency

findings.message: Database operation inside a loop can cause performance issues and unexpected costs
findings.recommendation: Move DB operations outside the loop or batch them

findings.message: Frequent polling trigger 'Schedule' can create high execution volume
findings.recommendation: Replace frequent polling with webhook or event-based trigger when possible

findings.message: Workflow has no error workflow configured
findings.recommendation: Configure an error workflow to handle failures gracefully

recommendations: Replace frequent polling with webhook/event-based triggers to reduce execution volume and cost.
Estimate token/API cost before moving AI nodes to production. Set usage limits and monitor spend regularly.
Configure error workflow/handling on critical workflows to ensure failures are caught and notified.
Add guardrails, rate limits, and concurrency controls around loops with HTTP to prevent runaway API costs.
Review webhook chain depth and add idempotency keys to prevent duplicate processing.
Move database operations outside loops or batch them to avoid performance degradation and unexpected costs.

risk_drivers: FREQ_POLL: Frequent polling trigger 'Cron' can create high execution volume
AI_NODE: AI/LLM node 'OpenAI' has variable token-based cost that can escalate
notes: AI node costs depend on token usage, not execution count

risk_drivers: LOOP_HTTP: HTTP Request node inside a loop/batch can multiply API calls and costs
FREQ_POLL: Frequent polling trigger 'Schedule' can create high execution volume

assumptions: Analysis is based on exported JSON workflow definitions only.
Actual execution volume depends on trigger frequency and input data size.
AI/LLM costs are estimated based on node presence, not actual token usage.
HTTP call costs assume external API pricing not included.
Webhook chains are inferred from node types and URL patterns.
Cost estimates are heuristic and not financial quotes.
Credential references are counted; secrets are never exposed.
Disabled nodes are excluded from risk analysis by default.
